# ItsMrMetaverse — Aragorn Meulendijks

> Aragorn Meulendijks (MrMetaverse) is a futurist and keynote speaker helping leaders navigate artificial intelligence, robotics, and exponential change. Delivered keynotes in 15+ countries. Writes deep-research publications at Parallax and builds AI-native tools in the Shelby portfolio.

## Topics
- Artificial intelligence and AI agents
- Humanoid robotics and embodied AI
- Exponential technology and the near future
- Future of work and the post-AGI economy
- AI policy, ethics, and geopolitics
- Keynote speaking and executive advisory

## Key Properties
- [Main site](https://www.itsmrmetaverse.com/) — profile, services, bookings
- [Parallax](https://parallax.itsmrmetaverse.com/) — deep-research articles on AI and exponential change
- [Shelby](https://shelby.itsmrmetaverse.com/) — AI-built (vibecoded) project portfolio

## Perspective
Aragorn approaches AI and robotics with wonder and pragmatism rather than fear. He emphasizes nuance over drama, opportunity over threat, and works hands-on with the technology — building AI systems himself — rather than commenting from the sidelines.

## Contact
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/itsmrmetaverse/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@ItsMrMetaverse
- Newsletter: https://itsmrmetaverse.substack.com
